dashboards.title: Cashflow Forecast
dashboards.description: Compare cashflow forecast versions — live from Google Drive.

dashboards.title: Student Enrollment
dashboards.description: Pipeline, funnel, and conversion metrics across the enrollment journey.

dashboards.title: Field Media
dashboards.description: Photos and videos uploaded by field staff via the media.pacificdiscovery.org app. Grouped by season + program.

dashboards.title: Flights
dashboards.description: Student flights tracker mirroring the enrollment pipeline, focused on logistics and program assignments (no payment data).

dashboards.title: Forward Business Report
dashboards.description: Forward-looking revenue and enrollment outlook by season and program.

dashboards.title: Instructor Field Reports
dashboards.description: Field reports submitted by instructors in-program — synthesized for operational follow-up.

dashboards.title: Invoices & Payments
dashboards.description: Upload invoices, email them in, or manually schedule payments. AI parses each invoice and slots it into a weekly pay schedule with approve / reschedule / paid checkboxes.

dashboards.title: Pacific Discovery - Marketing Lead Source Dashboard
dashboards.description: Live lead data synced from HubSpot with source, stage, and owner views.

dashboards.title: Add Pacific Discovery WhatsApp Contact
dashboards.description: Quickly save a new contact to your Google address book. Sign in with Google, fill in name, email, and phone, and save — the contact lands directly in contacts.google.com.

dashboards.title: Pipeline
dashboards.description: Live deal pipeline across all season programs with stage-by-stage drill-downs.

dashboards.title: Sales Funnel
dashboards.description: Opportunities, sales, and contact intake across the five Pacific Discovery season pipelines. Live from HubSpot.

dashboards.title: Sign Inbox
dashboards.description: Track signing status across your JotForm Sign documents — who's signed, who's still pending, and when.

dashboards.title: Send Instructor Contracts
dashboards.description: Fill in document fields and email a prefilled signing link to the recipient.

dashboards.title: Slider Manager
dashboards.description: Manage dashboard sliders and homepage content.

dashboards.title: Stripe Payments
dashboards.description: Live transactions and revenue summary pulled directly from Stripe. Click any row for full charge details.

dashboards.title: Student Document Uploads
dashboards.description: Files students have submitted via the Document Upload Jotform — grouped by email, so every file a student has ever sent shows up under one card.

dashboards.title: Add Unearthed WhatsApp Contact
dashboards.description: Save a contact directly to the Unearthed Education shared address book (info@unearthededucation.org) — no Google sign-in required.
